scope_check.evidence: Reviewed schema artifacts stayed within the assigned review-report policy scope.

goal_contract_check.evidence: The review artifact matches the schema-policy goal contract and required report fields.

scenario_flow_scores.evidence: The schema-policy review flow checked required review fields and acceptance gates.

build.evidence: No application build command exists for this schema-policy-only artifact.

lint.evidence: No lint command exists in package.json, so the lint check was not run.

test.evidence: No automated test harness exists for this schema-policy-only artifact.

run.evidence: No runnable app exists for this schema-policy-only artifact.

behavior_check.evidence: Manual behavior check inspected the schema-policy acceptance flow and rework gate behavior.

ux_workflow_completeness.evidence: This schema-policy review has no app workflow surface to inspect.

visual_polish.evidence: This schema-policy review has no app visual surface to inspect.

responsive_desktop_mobile.evidence: This schema-policy review has no desktop or mobile app surface to inspect.

accessibility_basics.evidence: This schema-policy review has no interactive app controls to inspect.

error_loading_empty_states.evidence: This schema-policy review has no app loading, error, or empty states to inspect.

text_overlap_layout_stability.evidence: This schema-policy review has no rendered app layout to inspect.

domain_fit.evidence: This schema-policy review has no app product domain vocabulary to inspect.

evidence.description: App-quality evidence is not required for this schema-policy review.

security_check.evidence: The reviewed schema artifact contains no secrets, external calls, or destructive behavior.

secret_scan_result.evidence: Secret scan found no credential-like values in the schema-policy artifact.

scope_diff_result.evidence: Changed artifacts matched the assigned schema-policy review scope.
